articles.title: A Titan's Story: Xerxes Desai & The Making Of A Homegrown Watchmaker
articles.summary: For many middle-class Indians, the first “grown-up” object we owned was a Titan watch. This is the story of how Xerxes Desai transformed Titan into a cultural symbol of aspiration, masculinity, taste, and modern India.

articles.title: From Dhaka’s Underground To Coke Studio: The Enduring Legacy Of Bangladesh's Meghdol
articles.summary: For over 20 years, Bangladeshi progressive rock band Meghdol has transformed Dhaka’s exhaustion, loneliness, and beauty into music. From ‘Esho Amar Shohore’ to ‘Bonobibi’, their work has redefined the sound of Bengali alternative rock across borders.
